subject: Swift Trigger 1159438 is also due to the Star Tracker loss of lock.
body:
K. L. Page (U Leicester) and T. M. Parsotan (GSFC/UMBC/CRESSTII)
report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Swift trigger 1159438 at 19:49:53 UT also occurred when the Star Tracker had lost
lock, and is not believed to be an interesting astrophysical event.
